ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "empno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "empname" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Job designation of the employee */,
  "doj" TEXT /* Date of joining the company */,
  "workgroupcategory" INTEGER /* Category of the workgroup the employee belongs to */,
  "workgroupcategoryname" TEXT /* Name of the workgroup category */,
  "deptno" INTEGER /* Department number where the employee is assigned */,
  "deptname" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee's residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee's residence */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee's residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee's residence */,
  "jobdescription" TEXT /* Job description of the employee */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (Full-time, Part-time, Intern, Contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("empno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_workgroupcategory FOREIGN KEY ("workgroupcategory") REFERENCES workgroups ("workgroupcategory"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_deptno FOREIGN KEY ("deptno") REFERENCES departments ("deptno")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "deptno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "deptname" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deptno")
)

CREATE TABLE "workgroups" (
  "workgroupcategory" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workgroup category */,
  "workgroupcategoryname" TEXT /* Name of the workgroup category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workgroup category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workgroupcategory")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "projectcode" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "projectname" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "projectstart" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "projectend" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "projectmanager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (In Progress, Completed, On Hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projectcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_projects" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project assignment */,
  "empno" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the project */,
  "projectcode" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "projectjoindate" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the project */,
  "projectenddate" TEXT /* Date the employee left the project */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance percentage during the project */,
  "utilization" INTEGER /* Utilization percentage during the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project (Team Member, Team Lead, Project Manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_projectcode FOREIGN KEY ("projectcode") REFERENCES projects ("projectcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_empno FOREIGN KEY ("empno") REFERENCES employees ("empno")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "empno" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the review */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee for the next review period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_empno FOREIGN KEY ("empno") REFERENCES employees ("empno")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "empno" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary change took effect */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* New salary amount */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus amount (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_empno FOREIGN KEY ("empno") REFERENCES employees ("empno")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Project Manager, Employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission applies */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module to which the permission applies */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the role has read access to the module */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Whether the role has write access to the module */,
  "delete" INTEGER /* Whether the role has delete access to the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
